templateSet:
<template name="getm" value="@org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping("/$PATH$")
public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<$RESP_TYPE$> get$METHOD$() {
    return org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity.ok($END$);
}" description="Spring GetMapping" toReformat="true" toShortenFQNames="true">
    
    
    
    
      
    
  
  <template name="postm" value="@org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping("/$PATH$")
public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<$RESP_TYPE$> create$METHOD$(@org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody $REQ_TYPE$ request) {
    return org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity.ok($END$);
}" description="Spring PostMapping" toReformat="true" toShortenFQNames="true">
